name: Todd Marn Gai
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the ground chicken, coconut milk, curry paste, fish sauce, and sugar.
2. Beat the mixture with an electric mixer until it becomes doughy.
3. Fold in the green beans into the mixture.
4. Flour your hands and shape the mixture into 6 thin patties (the mixture will be very soft).
5. Heat oil in a deep fryer or skillet to 350°F (175°C).
6. Fry the patties, one or two at a time, until they are golden brown on both sides.
7. Drain the patties on paper towels.
8. Serve hot with cucumber sauce on the side. Makes 3 healthy appetizers, or 6 for lighter fare.
Sauce Instructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine sugar, rice vinegar, red pepper flakes, peanuts (finely chopped), gingerroot (minced), and garlic (mined).
2. Stir until the sugar is dissolved.
3. Add cucumber and chill for at least 1/2 hour.
4. Serve in individual dishes topped with peanuts.
Note: Some recipes include adding 1/2 tsp minced garlic to the patty mixture.
